feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP OData WebService DataModel for CREATE-Operation - Am i doing this the intended way?
entry.content:
I am currently working on a project to upgrade existing SAP Function Models from external RFC to OData Rest-Services.

Certain things are set:

  • it has to be OData and REST
  • the interface has to be as close to the original as possible

The given Function Model has the followong architecture:

  • IMPORT
    • iv_testrun type BOOL
  • EXPORT
    • es_return like BAPIRET2
  • TABLES
    • IT_TIMETICKETS
    • ET_DETAIL_RETURN

The function model works relativly easy:

  • IMPORT is self-explanatory
  • EXPORT is given if something goes wrong which kills the processing
  • TABLES
    • the timetickets which shall be created to an existing order
    • the detailed return gives a message for each given ticket if the creation was succesfull or not and some details what went wrong

Knowing my way around the SEGW and the DPC, DPC_EXT, MPC, MPC_EXT -Classes i designed a webservice with a deep_entity setup.

  1. i created a KEY-Entity with a literal Key called ConfCreate to later connect the importing Values to.
  2. i created the VALUE-Entity which has basically all the inputs of IT_TIMETICKETS. This i connecte via an association with the KEY-Entity settings set on 1 to M.
  3. To get the detailed results i went in my opinion a bit sketchi... i created a third entity called RETURN. this on i also connected to the KEY-Entity with an association.

so overall the segw looks something like this:

and the associations look like this:

lastly i redefined the CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY Method of the DPC_EXT and voilà, it works...
...but its kind of ugly and it feels "done in the wrong way"

so this is the request:

{
  "Testrun": "",
  "Values": {
    "results": [
      {
        "ConfNo": "1",
        "Orderid": "",
        "Operation": "",
        "SubOper": "",
        "CapaCategory": ""
      },
      {
        "ConfNo": "2",
        "Orderid": "",
        "Operation": "",
        "SubOper": "",
        "CapaCategory": ""
      }
    ]
  },
  "Returns": []
}

ConfCreate is, as already explained, the "link" to the Value-Entries.
Testrun defines if it´s a testrun or not. Since both have to be adressable i defined them as KEYS.
And in Values, we have the timeticket-values which we can give noumerous at once into the service.

... And then there is results ... 
this is left blank because it is needed to be automatically in the tech_clauses, which is a string_table defining what goes in AND comes out.

If there should be a general error we get a 40X or 50X http status and if there is a business wrongdoing we get the results filled as intended

this is an example response:

[...]
    "Returns": {
      "results": [
        {
          "__metadata": {
            "id": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "uri": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "type": "Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01.Return"
          },
          "ConfCreate": "",
          "Testrun": "",
          "Type": "E",
          "MessageId": "RU",
          "MessageNumber": "020",
          "Message": "Rückmeldenr. 1 nicht vorhanden (Bitte Eingabe prüfen)",
          "LogNumber": "",
          "LogMsgNo": "000000",
          "MessageV1": "1",
          "MessageV2": "",
          "MessageV3": "",
          "MessageV4": "",
          "Parameter": "",
          "Row": 1,
          "Field": "",
          "System": "A05_010",
          "FlgLocked": false,
          "ConfNo": "0000000000",
          "ConfCnt": "00000000"
        },
        {
          "__metadata": {
            "id": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "uri": "https://.../sap/opu/odata/sap/Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01/ReturnSet(ConfCreate='',Testrun='')",
            "type": "Z...CONF_CREATE_SRV_01.Return"
          },
          "ConfCreate": "",
          "Testrun": "",
          "Type": "E",
          "MessageId": "RU",
          "MessageNumber": "020",
          "Message": "Rückmeldenr. 2 nicht vorhanden (Bitte Eingabe prüfen)",
          "LogNumber": "",
          "LogMsgNo": "000000",
          "MessageV1": "2",
          "MessageV2": "",
          "MessageV3": "",
          "MessageV4": "",
          "Parameter": "",
          "Row": 2,
          "Field": "",
          "System": "A05_010",
          "FlgLocked": false,
          "ConfNo": "0000000000",
          "ConfCnt": "00000000"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

so now we come to my question:

Is this really the intended way of solving sth like this?

Is there a more fitting configuration and setup hidden inside the SEGW i do not know yet?

So please, if someone is experienced with mass-creates and explicit returns for each individual create please let me know.

 

Kind Regards
Mirco

entry.title: managed rap + unmanged save and bapi getting success message + error site
entry.content:
Hi all,

hope you have a idea for my issue in my onPrem system. I create a managed rap business object displaying a maintenance order with operations and confirmations. For creating my confirmations I use a bapi (create maintenance confirmation with internal numbering). I embed the bapi in my handler class for unmanaged saving.

Using my generated fiori elements web site for creating a confirmation I get a success message and additional a error message (requested data wasn't found). In my console I see that my site made a get request with the maintenance order + operation but the key of the previous created confirmation are empty. 

How can I tell the system the key's of the created entity, so that the get method is processed correctly? 
Last week I made the course s4d437 and there the trainer told me to use late numbering, but how? The bapi manage the keys by itself. 

Does any one have a idea?

Thanks and regards
Bernd

entry.title: Adjust Transport Object Definition - SAP RAP Maintenance Object
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I would like to edit "Transport Object Definition" that is autogenerated in while creating a Maintenence Object via ADT. 

In ADT:

 

I need to add a new table which is newly associated to the root view. As per many online documentation we can adust it via SOBJ. But i am not able add a new entry into the table.

Regards,
Vishnu

@patrick_winkler any suggestions?

entry.title: Drag and Drop Functionality for Attachments using RAP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm looking for a drag and drop functionality using RAP where users can drag multiple files and upload at one shot. Please let me know the solution or suggestions here if anyone has achieved this kind of functionality.

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP RAP: Create Order with Business Partner
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm fairly new to RAP and would like to know what's the best way to implement the following scenario.

I would like to create an OData service for S/4Hana which is able to create an order and a business partner via deep create for example a customer or contact person.

I have found the Business Object Interface for the Business Partner "I_BusinessPartnerTP_2" which I can hope I can integrate into my service. I have also created a simple RAP service that is able to create the order as an unmanaged scenario.

Now I'm not sure how to associate my existing service with the Business Object Interface so I can create the order and the business partner together.

Thanks a lot

Lennart

entry.title: Public cloud HR master data of userid and pernr (person number (PA0105))
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to fetch the data from PA0105(HR master data) table in public cloud tenant. I need pernr and userid fields. I tried with custom cds view it's not working, is there any way to call the PA0105 / any standard APIs/ services? 

I checked Overview | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub I couldn't be able to find anything related to HR Master.

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: How to Suppress SAP Standard Message from the Message Class MM_PUR_SRCGPROJ. Way to Disable message
entry.content: We have a condition where we do not need the error message appearing on Standard UI Application. The message is a Standard Message from the class MM_PUR_SRCGPROJ. Need help to suppress the message.

entry.title: In Unmanaged without draft, validation and modify entity fields in List Page
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have developed and Unmanaged without draft enabled application in which 2 editable columns are added from the UI in the list page itself. Those are mapped with backend property. 

These values are available on my custom action via parameter with abstract entity, so that based on business logic action can be performed and results are displayed on popup respectively. This is as per business requirement.

 

 

But now, the challenge which I am facing before performing the action, I need to validate the Manual QTY input field and based on certain conditions, the user provided value should updated on UI along with WholebatchQTY should be unchecked. Basically on UI these values should be updated with the valid ones.

Ex- user puts 10 in manual qty, lets it checks with Production value/Pallet and based on that valid qty is 40, so it should get updated to 40 as well as wholebtachqty checkbox should be unckeched(abap_false).

I have tried multiple approaches like to handle in update method, but UI is not reflecting the update value. 

I am really stuck and out of options, request you to please suggest how to achieve it as this key functionality for business.  Help is very much appreciated.

 

Thanks,

Best Regards,

Raina

entry.title: REST Interface with free Structure in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to develop a REST interface in ABAP Cloud that accepts an arbitrary JSON payload. The idea is that I don't have too much control over payload and would like to pick up only some parts that are interesting to me. In old world, I could simply develop a service using IF_HTTP_EXTENSION and IF_REST_* interfaces. None of these seem to be available in ABAP Cloud. 

Is there an alternative to this approach in ABAP Cloud? I guess one workaround would be to use Large Objects available in RAP but I don't like how API looks like. I would really like to prefer to just receive JSON payload via POST on an endpoint.

Thanks

entry.title: BTP TRAIL ABAP Instance Unavailable
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am unable to login to my BTP ABAP instance and system shows below error in Eclipse.

Same is the case in BTP account as well.

Please let me know if its a global issue or a local issue in my account.

entry.title: Getting error in Eclipse ADT "Business Catalog is not supported in the selected project"
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming Model) application in Eclipse ADT. I need to schedule Background Job. While trying to create a Business Catalog using the context menu (New > Other Repository Object > Business Catalog), I get the following error:

"Business Catalog is not supported in the selected project"

I am not sure why this is happening, as I expected to add a catalog and create/assign Role to get Job template in Application Job screen. 

What I’ve Done:

  • Using Eclipse ADT (latest version) connected to an on-premise S/4HANA system.

  • I have created Application Job object and added sub object,  then created a class and created Application Job Catalog Entries and assigned class to it and then created Application Job Template (save and activated all).
  • I am unable to see custom template which I created in Application Job tile.
  • Upon further investigation, I got to know that we need to setup Authorizations for that I need to create Business catalog and Role for Authorization.
  • Right clicked on package and clicked on ABAP repository object but unable to find Business catalog. Then I selected my DEV system client from Eclipse, right clicked on it New ->other ->cloud Identity and access management ->Double clicked on Business Catalog, getting above error.

Question:

  • Why am I getting this error?

  • Is there a specific project type or system requirement for creating Business Catalogs in Eclipse ADT?

  • Do I need to configure something in the backend to enable this functionality?

Any help or guidance would be much appreciated!

Thanks,
Akbar Hussain

entry.title: RAP event trigger via SAP GUI tcode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on to consume RAP event from sales order creation. As per requirement, standard event should trigger from sales order creation via EML, Sales order app and SAP GUI related tcode(VA01) as well.

As far as I know RAP event doesn't trigger from SAP GUI tcode. Can anyone help here if there is any way to trigger standard rap event from SAP GUI tcode VA01 ?

Thanks.

Regards,

Jitendra

entry.title: How to filter column values by description if description concatenated to ID
entry.content:
Hello, community

I created RAP application where I have column product which described in projection view as 

      @EndUserText.label: 'Sales org.'
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'SalesOrgDescription' ]
      _SalesOrg.SalesOrgExtId,

And filtering by ext. ID works perfectly, but if I want to filter by description it is not working because column is ID 🙂
Does somebody have idea how to make a work around, should I change text element to SalesOrgExtId? Maybe you have other ideas I'll be appreciated any

entry.title: API Integration consume API passing attachment as http link for the 3rd party user to download
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I am working on api integration for Purchase Requisition between SAP and PROCOL. We have to consume the API shared by the client to transfer the data between SAP and PROCOL. We are doing this integration through PIPO. PIPO Consultant has created interface which we have used it in our abap program.

There is only one point which I could not able to achieve. The PR would be having attachments which I have to send it to PROCOL as http link as shown below in a variable of the nested structure shared by PROCOL.

Is it possible that the image attachment which was associated with the PR would be shared as http link by passing into the structure?

entry.title: SAP RAP Free Search and list sort in Fiori Application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating a sample RAP application from the SAP Learning course "Building Apps with the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model" 

I am caught with 2 issues

1. Free search is not working in the Fiori app. 

Images of BO projection

Fiori Application Data

 

with Free Search

 

 

2. Sorting Order of the List in the Fiori Application

Any advice that could help me understand why I am encountering the above issues would be greatly appreciated.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP Fiori SAP BTP ABAP environment

entry.title: Create custom entity with compositions exposed as OData V4 API
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a question which I am not able to solve by myself ^^

My requirement basically is to create a new custom API in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud that allows me, for a given {warehouse + batch-managed product + quantity}, to find the list of all batch numbers, that can be consumed to address that batch-managed product's quantity based on some rules.

I gave myself as objective to create this structure as output of my new custom API, with a header structure (giving the status of the batch determination logic) and an item list (giving the list of all the batch numbers that should be used for the consumption, with the quantity to be consumed in each batch):

I started by created 2 custom CDS entities: one for the header structure and another one for the item structure.

I added this annotation to both these 2 custom CDS entities "@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP:ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" where "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" is a custom class referencing interface "IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER" In order to be able to trigger its method "SELECT" when someone tries to retrieve data from either one of my 2 custom CDS entities. 

In order to have a parent-child relationship between my 2 custom CDS entities, I added a composition statement in the header custom entity CDS view and an association to parent statement in the line-items child custom entity CDS view.

Custom Entity for the Header parent CDS view:

Custom Entity for the Line-Item Child CDS view:

Then I implemented code for the SELECT statement of my custom class ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1.

Once done, I created a new service definition exposing both my 2 custom cds entities:

Then I exposed my service definition into an OData V4 API service binding, followed with the normal communication scenario, comm arrangement configuration..

My problem is that, once all this is done, when I try to execute my API from POSTMAN, I am not able to get the header AND the item data AT THE SAME TIME.

I am able for instance to get data for the header custom entity CDS view with the correct structure I defined: 

I am also able to get data for the line_item custom entity CDS view, for the different batch numbers to use for the consumption as per the structure I designed:

But, How can I merge these two results of these 2 entities in the same response?

I want my custom API response to be similar to the following one: 

How can I accomplish this please?

I thought by creating a composition relationship between these 2 custom entities, that the SELECT method will fetch data for both header and Item custom entity CDS views and that the result will be merged in the same response, but it is not.

Also, when I run a GET OData call to the header entity, "SELECT" method of class "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET0" is called only once, and "io_request->get_entity_id( )" gives "ZC_TEST_BATCH_DETERMIN_HD" as entity. This means, that my logic is being executed ONLY on the header custom CDS view, which is not enough to fulfill my requirement.

Then I tried to add "$expand" to the OData URL to execute, by adding "?$expand=_BatchDetItemDetails" to my URL:

but I am getting HTTP Bad Request error in POSTMAN : "

"The expand option's expand path contains an invalid property '_BatchDetItemDetails'",

Can someone help me on this please? I feel like my custom API is not designed to "accept" any "expand" attribute. 

Or if you have another idea on how to achieve this, without having to use the "?$expand" statement?

Thanks experts

entry.title: How to add extra fields as editable fields to a RAP BO?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm looking for a way to add additional fields to the behavior definition of a RAP BO so that we can change those fields from inside that object. To simply display data we have virtual elements in the projection layer, but in this case we want the fields to be editable. The changes could be saved to an external table via an additional save or unmanaged save, but the tricky thing here seems to be how to add these extra fields to the behavior definition?

Why this question: for example, why I'm looking into this, in HR some long texts are stored as HRPxxxx TLINE tables. Since we don't want to have the user edit these texts, truncated line per line in a table, we need to have a string field in our BO which contains the concatenated version of the HR table data.  In addition it might also be necessary to introduce an etag field for existing tables without admin data, if we want to make that BO draft enabled.

Some approaches I've been looking into so far:

- Use a custom entity as behavior definition entity: unfortunately no draft nor projection layer available with this approach and unmanaged scenario

- Do an outer join with an (empty) z-table which contains the additional fields in the view that is used by the behavior definition: this can actually work but it feels a bit creative. By implementing an edit with additional implementation (here we read the HR table, convert from TLINE tab to string, and set that value in our draft) + an additional/unmanaged save to write back the updated string as TLINE tab in the HR table.

So since my field does not literally exist in any db table, even via the full unmanaged scenario I didn't find a way to solve it in an elegant way. What I'm looking for is a recommended approach to have virtual (changeable) fields in the definition layer instead of the available read-only ones in the projection layer.

Any advice? 🙂

Thanks in advance!

KR,

Bjorn

entry.title: Unable to delete Application Job Catalog on ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I ran an ABAP class for creating an application job catalog.

Unfortunetly, the transport request number was wrong, so the creation failed.

I tried to put the right transport request number, but the creation of the application job catalog fail with the error :

Creation of job catalog entry failed: Object ZMY_OBJECT (type job catalog entry) already exists.

However, there is no job catalog under the Application Job Catalog Entries folder, neither in the IAM Apps folder.

Is there a way to do a clean delete of the catalog ? Or do I have to create a new catalog with a new name ?

Thanks in advance,

Rémy

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

Please support

Best regards,Antony Pantoja

entry.title: RAP modify entity returns no error on failed Sales Order update (messages in es_reported are ignored
entry.content:
I’m working with a RAP-based modify entity call for a Sales Order. The issue is that even when the change is not successful, the framework returns no error – both the failed and reported parameters remain empty.

 

However, I debugged the call and noticed that inside the lhl_header=>modify method, messages are being correctly added to es_reported. It seems like these messages are not being transferred back to the top-level RAP framework and are not visible in the modify entity response.

 

For context: the modify entity call is triggered from within a custom ABAP report (not via UI or service consumption)

Could someone help me understand why the messages from es_reported are not propagated and why no error or feedback is shown even when the modification fails?

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp
ENTITY salesorder
UPDATE FIELDS ( ... )
WITH VALUE #( ... )
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).

IF failed IS INITIAL AND reported IS INITIAL.
WRITE: 'No feedback returned, but update failed in backend'.
ENDIF.

Thanks in advance,
Jalal
